Appearances:
Plaintiff, John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Jason Vandara.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Gregory Orme is present.
Attorney, Jason Erlich , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Sandy McNabb, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-12-2010 is vacated.
